name: my-plants-database
description: Datenbeschaffung und -aufbereitung für die My-Plants Lern-App

scripts.build-all: npm run fetch-keys && npm run enrich-species && npm run enrich-wikidata && npm run filter-species && npm run collect-multimedia
scripts.build-species: npm run fetch-keys && npm run enrich-species && npm run enrich-wikidata && npm run filter-species
scripts.test:all: npm run test:fetch && npm run test:enrich && npm run test:wikidata && npm run test:filter && npm run test:multimedia

author: My-Plants Team
